Ni muri urwo rwego RGB itanze iyi raporo ku nshuro ya munani. Mu izina rya RGB no mu izina ryanjye bwite, nejejwe no kubagezaho Raporo y’ibikorwa y’umwaka w’ingengo

Minisitiri w’Intebe. Ni muri urwo rwego RGB itanze iyi raporo ku nshuro ya munani. Mu izina rya RGB no mu izina ryanjye bwite, nejejwe no kubagezaho Raporo y’ibikorwa y’umwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024 na Gahunda y’ibikorwa by’umwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2024-2025. Mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, RGB yari yateganyije ibikorwa 53, muri byo 52 bihwanye na 98% byarakozwe birarangira. Ku bijyanye n’ingengo y’imari, RGB yari yagenewe amafaranga y’u Rwanda 2.972.069.056 arimo 1.882.582.645 yaturutse mu ngengo y’imari ya Leta ndetse na 1.089.486.411 yatanzwe n’abafatanyabikorwa binyuze mu mishinga ishyigikira gahunda z’imiyoborere. Muri rusange ingengo y’imari yakoreshejwe ku kigero cya 92,6% aho ingengo y’imari itangwa na Leta yakoreshejwe ku kigero cya 94,2% naho iy’imishinga ikoreshwa ku kigero cya 89,7%. Ibikorwa by’Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2024-2025 bizibanda ku bushakashatsi ku miyoborere, igenzura ku miyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi, gukurikirana imikorere y’imiryango itari iya leta, ishingiye ku myemerere n’imitwe ya politiki,

rw’Imiyoborere mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2024-2025 bizibanda ku bushakashatsi ku miyoborere, igenzura ku miyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi, gukurikirana imikorere y’imiryango itari iya leta, ishingiye ku myemerere n’imitwe ya politiki, kujya inama ku iterambere n’imikorere by’urwego rw’itangazamakuru. RGB izanakomeza kubaka ubufatanye n’imikoranire n’inzego zitandukanye hagamijwe guteza imbere amahame y’imiyoborere no kunoza imitangire ya serivisi mu nzego zose. Mu izina ry’ubuyobozi bwa RGB ndashima inzego zose, abafatanyabikorwa n’abakozi b’Urwego ku ruhare bagize mu bikorwa RGB yakoze mu mwaka wa 2023-2024 byagize uruhare mu guteza imbere imiyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi bishyira umuturage ku isonga. Ibi bikorwa kandi byashobotse kubera ingengo y’imari RGB igenerwa na Leta binyuze muri Minisiteri y’Imari n’Igenamigambi. Ibyagezweho biduha inshingano nka RGB yo gukomeza kubaka ubufatanye mu bikorwa biteza imbere imiyoborere, imitangire ya serivisi, imikorere y’imiryango itari iya leta, iy’ishingiye ku myemerere, iy’imitwe ya politike n’iy’urwego rw’itangazamakuru bitanga umusanzu ufatika mu iterambere ry’igihugu. Dr. Doris Uwicyeza Picard Umukuru w’Urwego

Ibyakozwe bikubiye mu byiciro bitandatu (6) bikurikira: (1) Ubushakashatsi ku miyoborere n’uburyo bwo kwishakamo ibisubizo, (2) Kugenzura imitangire ya serivisi, guteza imbere imiyoborere myiza n’ihuriro ry’abafatanyabikorwa mu iterambere, (3) Kwandika, gukurikirana no kongerera ubushobozi imitwe ya politiki, Imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere n’Imiryango itari iya Leta (4) Guteza imbere urwego rw’ itangazamakuru, (5) Ibiganiro bishimangira ubufatanye n’imikorere inoze (6) n’imirimo rusange ishyigikira ibikorwa by’Urwego. Mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, RGB yari yateganyije ibikorwa 53 Muri byo 52 bihwanye na 98% byarakozwe birarangira. Ku bijyanye n’ingengo y’imari, RGB yari yagenewe amafaranga y’u Rwanda 2.972.069.056 arimo 1.882.582.645 yaturutse mu ngengo y’imari ya Leta ndetse na 1.089.486.411 yatanzwe n’abafatanyabikorwa binyuze mu mishinga

98% byarakozwe birarangira. Ku bijyanye n’ingengo y’imari, RGB yari yagenewe amafaranga y’u Rwanda 2.972.069.056 arimo 1.882.582.645 yaturutse mu ngengo y’imari ya Leta ndetse na 1.089.486.411 yatanzwe n’abafatanyabikorwa binyuze mu mishinga ishyigikira gahunda z’imiyoborere. Muri rusange ingengo y’imari yakoreshejwe ku kigero cya 92,6% aho ingengo y’imari itangwa na Leta yakoreshejwe ku kigero cya 94,2% naho iy’imishinga ikoreshwa ku kigero cya 89,7%. Mu rwego rw’ubushakashatsi, RGB yakoze Igipimo cy’Imiyoborere mu Rwanda (Rwanda Governance Scorecard 11th Edition). Muri RGS ya 11, inkingi esheshatu (6) ku munani ziri ku gipimo cya 80% kuzamura mu gihe ebyiri (2) zisigaye ziri ku gipimo kiri hagati ya 75% na 79,9%. Inkingi y’Umutekano ni yo yaje ku isonga n’amanota 93,82% mu gihe inkingi yo Kuzamura imibereho myiza y’abaturage ari yo yaje inyuma n’amanota 75,21% ikaba yarasubiye inyuma ho 0.30% ugereranyije na RGS ya 10. RGB yanakoze ubushakashatsi ku Ishusho y’uko abaturage babona imiyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu nzego

ari yo yaje inyuma n’amanota 75,21% ikaba yarasubiye inyuma ho 0.30% ugereranyije na RGS ya 10. RGB yanakoze ubushakashatsi ku Ishusho y’uko abaturage babona imiyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu nzego zibegereye (CRC). CRC 2024 yagaragaje ko abaturage bishimiye imitangire ya serivisi ku kigero cya 76,5%. Ibyiciro 9 kuri 16 byasuzumwe biri hejuru ya 75%, aho umutekano waje ku isonga n’amanota 91,3% naho ubuhinzi buza ku mwanya wa nyuma n’amanota 61,5%. Ku bufatanye n’Ikigo cy’Igihugu gishinzwe Imikurire no Kurengera Umwana (NCDA), RGB yakoze ubushakashatsi kuri gahunda mbonezamikurire y’abana bato (ECD program). Ubu bushakashatsi bwibanze ku nkingi esheshatu (6) ari zo: Imirire, Ubuzima, Isuku n’isukura, Uburere buboneye, Gutegura umwana kwiga hakiri kare ndetse no Kurinda no kurengera umwana. Ubushakashatsi bugaragaza ko inkingi y’ubuzima ari yo iri ku isonga n’amanota 83.9%; akaba ari na yo yari imbere muri ECD Scorecard ya mbere n’iya kabiri. Inkingi yo kurinda no kurengera umwana iri ku gipimo

y’ubuzima ari yo iri ku isonga n’amanota 83.9%; akaba ari na yo yari imbere muri ECD Scorecard ya mbere n’iya kabiri. Inkingi yo kurinda no kurengera umwana iri ku gipimo cya 41,5% akaba ari nayo ikomeje kuza inyuma muri ubu bushakashatsi. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024 hatangijwe ubushakashatsi bwo guzuma uruhare rwa gahunda z’umwimerere nyarwanda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo, nyuma ya Jenoside yakorewe Abatutsi mu 1994, hagamijwe kureba akamaro izi gahunda zagiriye Abanyarwanda URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’IMIYOBORERE 1 --- PAJIRI 14 --- n’ibyo abantu bazigiraho mu gihe kizaza. Ubu bushakashatsi bukorwa ku ku bufatanye bwa RGB n’abashakashatisi ba Kaminuza ya Calgary (Canada). Ibiganiro abashakashatsi bagiranye n’ibyiciro bitandukanye by’abaturage n’abayobozi byagaragaje ko gahunda nyarwanda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo zatanze umusanzu muri ibi bikurikira: Ubutabera bwunga, Ubuyobozi n’imiyoborere, gusigasira indangagaciro nyarwanda no guteza imbere uruhare rw’abaturage mu bibakorerwa, kwihutisha iterambere, no kuzamura imibereho myiza y’abaturage. RGB yasesenguye ibyavuye mu byegeranyo Mvamahanga bitandukanye bigaragaza uko ibihugu bihagaze

Ubuyobozi n’imiyoborere, gusigasira indangagaciro nyarwanda no guteza imbere uruhare rw’abaturage mu bibakorerwa, kwihutisha iterambere, no kuzamura imibereho myiza y’abaturage. RGB yasesenguye ibyavuye mu byegeranyo Mvamahanga bitandukanye bigaragaza uko ibihugu bihagaze mu byiciro binyuranye hagamijwe kureba uko u Rwanda rugaragazwa n’ibyo byegeranyo mu ruhando Mvamahanga aho muri uyu mwaka hasesenguwe ibyegeranyo birindwi (7). Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yakoze isuzuma ry’imitangire ya serivisi z’ubutaka. Iri suzuma ryakorewe mu nzego 92 zirimo Ikigo cy’Igihugu gishinzwe ubutaka, Umujyi wa Kigali, uturere, imirenge n’utugari hanabazwa abaturage 2.228 basabye izi serivisi. Hasuzumwe serivisi zijyanye no kwandikisha ubutaka, gutanga ibyangombwa byo kubaka no guhererekanya uburenganzira ku butaka. Ibyavuye mu igenzura bigaragaza ko serivisi zijyanye no kwandikisha ubutaka zishimwa ku gipimo 74,16%, izo gutanga ibyangombwa byo kubaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 75,92% naho izo guhererekanya uburenganzira ku butaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 74,76%. Mu rwego rwo kongera ubumenyi bw’inzego zitandukanye ku mahame y’imitangire ya serivisi no kuzikangurira

zishimwa ku gipimo cya 75,92% naho izo guhererekanya uburenganzira ku butaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 74,76%. Mu rwego rwo kongera ubumenyi bw’inzego zitandukanye ku mahame y’imitangire ya serivisi no kuzikangurira kuyashyira mu bikorwa, RGB yatanze ibiganiro ku mitangire ya serivisi ku bayobozi n’abakozi banyuranye mu ntara zose n’Umujyi wa Kigali binyuze muri gahunda ya “Nk’Uwikorera”. Ibiganiro byitabiriwe n’abaturutse mu nzego za Leta, iz’abikorera n’imiryango itari iya Leta. Ubu bukangurambaga bwanakozwe hifashishijwe ibiganiro byatambutse mu bitangazamakuru. Mu mwaka utangirwa raporo, RGB yakurikiranye uko inzego zitandukanye zishyira mu bikorwa ibipimo fatizo by’imitangire ya serivisi ari byo: Gutanga serivisi ku gihe, Kubahiriza amabwiriza y’imitangire ya serivisi, Korohereza abasaba serivisi kuzigeraho, Uburyo bunoze bwo gusubiza ibibazo by’abakugana, Kwita ku bakugana, Ubushobozi no kwizerwa by’utanga serivisi n’Ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Hakozwe igenzura ry’ibi bipimo mu nzego 22 harimo zirindwi zasuwe na 15 zandikiwe zisabwa raporo z’uko zashyize mu bikorwa ibi bipimo. Igenzura ryagaragaje ko hakiri icyuho mu

serivisi n’Ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Hakozwe igenzura ry’ibi bipimo mu nzego 22 harimo zirindwi zasuwe na 15 zandikiwe zisabwa raporo z’uko zashyize mu bikorwa ibi bipimo. Igenzura ryagaragaje ko hakiri icyuho mu ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ibi bipimo. Bigendanye n’inshingano ifite yo guteza imbere imiyoborere myiza, RGB yakurikiranye ibikorwa bya gahunda yo kwigenzura no kwigiranaho byakozwe mu ntara zose n’Umujyi wa Kigali. RGB yashyikirijwe gahunda na raporo byahurijwe ku rwego rwa buri ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali irazisesengura, inatanga inama ku bikeneye kunozwa mu ishyirwa mu bikorwa rya gahunda yo kwigenzura no kwigiranaho. Ku bufatanye n’ubuyobozi bw’intara, Umujyi wa Kigali, uturere n’abagize Ihuriro ry’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere, RGB yateguye inama ziteganywa n’amabwiriza ya Minisitiri w’Intebe agenga imikorere ya JADF. Hakozwe inama nyunguranabitekerezo imwe muri buri ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali ndetse n’inama enye mpuzabikorwa z’igihembwe. Izi nama zari zigamije gukurikirana, guhuriza hamwe ibikorwa no kujya inama ku cyarushaho URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 2 [Ishusho iboneka kuri

ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali ndetse n’inama enye mpuzabikorwa z’igihembwe. Izi nama zari zigamije gukurikirana, guhuriza hamwe ibikorwa no kujya inama ku cyarushaho URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 2 [Ishusho iboneka kuri iyi pajiri: image_0] --- PAJIRI 15 --- guteza imbere uruhare rwa JADF mu iterambere. Ku birebana na JADF kandi, RGB ku bufatanye n’umuryango Imbuto foundation, yakoze isuzuma ku mikorere ya JADF mu turere 15 hibandwa ku byakozwe mu gihe cy’imyaka itanu (2018-2023). Isuzuma ryerekanye ko abafatanyabikorwa ba JADF banyuzwe n’imikorere y’Inteko rusange ya JADF ku kigero cya 82,7% na Komite Nyobozi ku kigero cya 76,5%. Ku rundi ruhande ariko, 10,1% by’ababajijwe bagaragaje ko batazi imikorere y’Inteko Rusange, mu gihe 14,2% bagaragaje ko batazi imikorere ya Komite Nyobozi. Isuzuma ariko ryerekanye ko hari ibigikeneye kunozwa mu mitegurire y’inama z’Inteko rusange na komite nyobozi za JADF kuko izo nzego zidaterana uko biteganywa n’itegeko. Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere rufatanyije na Minisiteri y’Ubutegetsi bw’Igihugu, Minisiteri

ko hari ibigikeneye kunozwa mu mitegurire y’inama z’Inteko rusange na komite nyobozi za JADF kuko izo nzego zidaterana uko biteganywa n’itegeko. Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere rufatanyije na Minisiteri y’Ubutegetsi bw’Igihugu, Minisiteri ya Siporo, intara n’Umujyi wa Kigali, uturere n’imirenge hateguwe amarushanwa y’imiyoborere myiza azwi nk’Umurenge Kagame Cup. Aya marushanwa, yitabiriwe n’amakipe y’abagabo n’abagore mu mikino ikurikira: umupira w’amaguru, sit-ball, volleyball, basketball, gusiganwa ku magare, gusiganwa ku maguru, gusimbuka urukiramende no kubuguza. Aya marushanwa yahawe insanganyamatsiko igira iti “Imyaka 30 y’imiyoborere ishyira umuturage ku isonga”. Ubutumwa bwatanzwe muri aya marushanwa bwibanze ku gukangurira abaturage kugira uruhare mu miyoborere myiza ndetse no mu bibakorerwa, kunoza imitangire ya serivisi, gukangurira urubyiruko guteza imbere impano zabo, kwirinda no kurwanya ikoreshwa ry’ibiyobyabwenge, ubusinzi n’andi makosa ababuza kwiteza imbere. Abaturage bashishikarijwe kandi kuzitabira ibikorwa by’amatora ya Perezida wa Repubulika n’Abadepite yari ateganyijwe kuva tariki 14 kugeza tariki 16 Kamena 2024. Abahize abandi muri aya marushanwa bahawe ibihembo

kwiteza imbere. Abaturage bashishikarijwe kandi kuzitabira ibikorwa by’amatora ya Perezida wa Repubulika n’Abadepite yari ateganyijwe kuva tariki 14 kugeza tariki 16 Kamena 2024. Abahize abandi muri aya marushanwa bahawe ibihembo birimo amafaranga, imidari, ibikombe n’imipira yo kwambara. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yanditse imiryango nyarwanda itari iya Leta mishya 230 harimo 121 yahawe ubuzima gatozi na 109 yahawe icyangombwa cy’iyandikwa cy’agateganyo. Handitswe kandi imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere 22 harimo 19 yahawe ubuzima gatozi n’itatu (3) yahawe icyangombwa cyo guhuza n’itegeko. Imiryango Mvamahanga itari iya Leta mishya 21 yahawe ibyangombwa biyemerera gukorera mu Rwanda, 113 yongererwa igihe cyo gukorera mu Rwanda. Raporo zatanzwe n’imiryango Mvamahanga itari iya Leta zagaragaje ko iyi miryango yakoresheje ingengo y’imari ingana n’amadorali y’Amerika 268.245.761 mu mishinga itandukanye. Ku bufatanye na UNDP, RGB yatanze inkunga y’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 514.337.285 ku miryango itari iya Leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere 31, mu rwego rwo kuyubakira ubushobozi no gushyira mu

itandukanye. Ku bufatanye na UNDP, RGB yatanze inkunga y’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 514.337.285 ku miryango itari iya Leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere 31, mu rwego rwo kuyubakira ubushobozi no gushyira mu bikorwa imishinga itandukanye iteza imbere abaturage. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yakoze ku nshuro ya gatanu (5) ubushakashatsi ku gipimo cy’iterambere ry’itangazamakuru mu Rwanda (Rwanda Media Barometer 2024). Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko igipimo cy’iterambere ry’itangazamakuru mu Rwanda kiri kuri 76,7%. Muri RMB 2024, Igipimo cy’Ishyirwaho ry’amategeko na politiki byorohereza imikorere y’itangazamakuru ni cyo cyaje imbere kuri 90% mu gihe igipimo cy’Ubushobozi n’ubunyamwuga bw’itangazamakuru ari cyo cyaje inyuma kuri 60,7%. Mu bibazo byagaragajwe n’ubu bushakashatsi bikeneye kwitabwaho by’umwihariko harimo URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’IMIYOBORERE 3 [Ishusho iboneka kuri iyi pajiri: image_0] --- PAJIRI 16 --- URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 4 amikoro adahagije mu bitangazamakuru, ubunyamwuga bwa bamwe mu banyamakuru bukiri hasi, umubare ukiri hasi w’abanyamakuru b’abagore n’imikoreshereze itanoze y’ururimi rw’Ikinyarwanda. Mu rwego rwo guteza

--- URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 4 amikoro adahagije mu bitangazamakuru, ubunyamwuga bwa bamwe mu banyamakuru bukiri hasi, umubare ukiri hasi w’abanyamakuru b’abagore n’imikoreshereze itanoze y’ururimi rw’Ikinyarwanda. Mu rwego rwo guteza imbere itangazamakuru, RGB yateye inkunga y’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 354.822.968 ibikorwa by’amashyirahamwe y’abanyamakuru abiri (ARJ, ARFEM) n’Urwego rw’Abanyamakuru bigenzura (RMC). Iyi nkunga yakoreshejwe mu bikorwa by’aya mashyirahamwe bigamije guteza imbere urwego rw’itangazamakuru, guteza imbere ubunyamwuga bw’abanyamakuru no gukora imirimo y’ibanze yo gushyiraho Koperative y’Abanyamakuru (MEDECO). Mu bikorwa bijyanye n’ubuyobozi n’imirimo rusange, hibanzwe ku gukurikirana ishyirwa mu bikorwa rya gahunda y’ibikorwa by’umwaka wa 2023-2024 no gutegura iby’umwaka wa 2024- 2025, imicungire y’ingengo y’imari n’abakozi, kongerera ubushobozi Urwego n’abakozi barwo, kwimakaza ihame ry’uburinganire muri gahunda n’ibikorwa byose by’Urwego no mu bafatanyabikorwa. Mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, Umugenzuzi Mukuru w’Imari ya Leta yakoze ubugenzuzi bw’imikoreshereze y’ingengo y’imari RGB yahawe mu mwaka wa 2022-2023. Ibyavuye muri ubu bugenzuzi byerekana ko RGB yabonye raporo

mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, Umugenzuzi Mukuru w’Imari ya Leta yakoze ubugenzuzi bw’imikoreshereze y’ingengo y’imari RGB yahawe mu mwaka wa 2022-2023. Ibyavuye muri ubu bugenzuzi byerekana ko RGB yabonye raporo nta makemwa (unqualified audit opinion). Iyi raporo igaragaza kandi ko RGB yashyize mu bikorwa ku gipimo cy’ijana ku ijana (100%) inama yari yagiriwe mu bugenzuzi bwa 2021-2022. Mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2024- 2025, RGB yateganyije ibikorwa 37 bizatwara ingengo y’imari y’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 2.155.154.787, arimo 1.933.233.657 azava mu ngengo y’imari ya Leta na 221.921.130 azava mu bafatanyabikorwa. Intego nyamukuru y’ubu bushakashatsi ni ugufasha inzego zegereye abaturage kunoza imitangire ya serivisi no kurushaho kurangwa n’imiyoborere ishyira umuturage ku isonga. Ubushakashatsi bwakorewe ku baturage 10.538 mu gihugu hose, bunatanga akazi ku bakarani b’ubushakashatsi 84. CRC 2024 yubakiye ku byiciro 16 bikubiye mu nkingi eshatu za gahunda ya Guverinoma y’imyaka irindwi (NST1), arizo: Ubukungu, Imibereho myiza n’Imiyoborere. Mu bukungu hasuzumwe ubuhinzi, ubworozi, ibikorwaremezo, ikoranabuhanga n’itumanaho, ubutaka n’imiturire ndetse n’urwego rw’abikorera. Mu mibereho myiza hasuzumwe uburezi, ubuzima, isuku, gahunda zo kuzamura imibereho no kwita ku batishoboye ndetse n’imibereho y’umuryango

bukungu hasuzumwe ubuhinzi, ubworozi, ibikorwaremezo, ikoranabuhanga n’itumanaho, ubutaka n’imiturire ndetse n’urwego rw’abikorera. Mu mibereho myiza hasuzumwe uburezi, ubuzima, isuku, gahunda zo kuzamura imibereho no kwita ku batishoboye ndetse n’imibereho y’umuryango nyarwanda. Mu nkingi y’Imiyoborere hasuzumwe serivisi zitangwa n’inzego z’ibanze, ubutabera, iyubahirizwa ry’amahame y’imiyoborere n’icyizere ku nzego z’ubuyobozi, umutekano ndetse n’uruhare rw’abaturage mu bibakorerwa. CRC 2024 yagaragaje ko abaturage bishimiye imitangire ya serivisi ku kigero cya 76,5%. Ibyiciro 9 kuri 16 byasuzumwe biri hejuru ya 75%, aho umutekano waje ku isonga n’amanota 91,3% naho ubuhinzi buza ku mwanya wa nyuma n’amanota 61,5%. 1.1.2. INCAMAKE Y’UBUSHAKASHATSI KURI GAHUNDA MBONEZAMIKURIRE Y’ABANA BATO (ECD SCORECARD YA 3) Ku bufatanye n’Ikigo cy’Igihugu gishinzwe Imikurire no Kurengera Umwana (NCDA), RGB yakoze ubushakashatsi kuri gahunda mbonezamikurire y’abana bato (ECD program). Ubu bushakashatsi bwakozwe hagamijwe gupima imikorere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu ngo mbonezamukurire y’abana bato no kugaragaza intambwe imaze guterwa mu ishyirwamubikorwa rya serivisi zitangwa mu ngo mbonezamikuririre nk’uko bikubiye muri gahunda ya Guverinoma y’imyaka irindwi (NST1).

n’imitangire ya serivisi mu ngo mbonezamukurire y’abana bato no kugaragaza intambwe imaze guterwa mu ishyirwamubikorwa rya serivisi zitangwa mu ngo mbonezamikuririre nk’uko bikubiye muri gahunda ya Guverinoma y’imyaka irindwi (NST1). Ubu bushakashatsi bwakorewe mu turere twose tw’Igihugu, muri two harimo 13 dukoreramo umushinga wo kurwanya igwingira (Stunting Prevention and Reduction Project -SPRP) twagaragayemo imirire mibi n’igwingira ry’abana bato kurusha utundi. Ni muri urwo rwego, hatekerejwe icyakorwa gishingiye ku mwimerere w’Abanyarwanda n’amahirwe ahari mu gushaka ibisubizo by’ ibyo bibazo. Ni muri urwo rwego hagiyeho gahunda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo zishingiye ku muco n’indangagaciro by’Abanyarwanda. Ku bufatanye bw’Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere n’abashakashatsi ba Kaminuza ya Calgary (Canada), hatangijwe ubushakashatsi

by’ ibyo bibazo. Ni muri urwo rwego hagiyeho gahunda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo zishingiye ku muco n’indangagaciro by’Abanyarwanda. Ku bufatanye bw’Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere n’abashakashatsi ba Kaminuza ya Calgary (Canada), hatangijwe ubushakashatsi bwo guzuma uruhare rwa gahunda z’umwimerere nyarwanda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo, nyuma ya Jenoside yakorewe Abatutsi mu 1994, hagamijwe kureba akamaro izi gahunda zagiriye Abanyarwanda n’ibyo abantu bazigiraho mu gihe kizaza. Hakozwe ibiganiro (interviews) n’abatekereje ndetse n’abashyize mu bikorwa izi gahunda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo hagamijwe kumenya icyo zagejeje ku Banyarwanda. Ibi biganiro byagaragaje ko gahunda nyarwanda zo kwishakamo ibisubizo zatanze umusanzu muri ibi bikurikira: Ubutabera bwunga, Ubuyobozi n’imiyoborere, Indangagaciro nyarwanda n’uruhare rw’abaturage, Kwihutisha iterambere, Uruhare rw’abaturage n’Imibereho myiza. Ubu bushakashatsi buracyakomeje hasuzumwa ibitekerezo by’abagenerwabikorwa b’izi gahunda n’abazishyira mu bikorwa mu nzego z’ibanze. 1.1.5. z’ibanze. 1.1.5. KUMENYEKANISHA IBYAVUYE MU BUSHAKASHATSI KU MIYOBORERE IMENYEKANISHA RY’IBYAVUYE MURI CRC YA 2023 RGB yakoze imenyekanisha rya CRC ya 2023 mu ntara zose, Umujyi wa Kigali, mu turere 6 no mu nzego zihariye, hagamijwe kuganira ku byavuye muri ubu bushakashatsi no ku ngamba z’ibyagaragaye bikeneye kunozwa. Ibi biganiro byitabiriwe n’abayobozi b’intara n’ab’Umujyi wa Kigali, ab’inzego z’ibanze kuva ku mudugudu kugeza ku karere, abahagarariye inzego za Leta ku rwego rw’Igihugu, ab’inzego z’umutekano, abagize Inama Njyanama z’uturere n’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere ku rwego rw’uturere (JADF). Nyuma yo gutangarizwa ibyavuye muri CRC ya 2023, abitabiriye inama bafashe ingamba zo gushyira imbaraga ahagiye hagaragara intege nke no gukomeza gusigasira ibyagezweho. Iki gikorwa cyitabiriwe n’abayobozi mu nzego za Leta zitandukanye, abahagarariye ibihugu byabo n’imiryango Mvamahanga mu Rwanda, abashakashatsi n’impuguke mu miyoborere n’iterambere. IMITANGIRE YA SERIVISI, KWIMAKAZA IMIYOBORERE MYIZA N’IHURIRO RY’ABAFATANYABIKORWA MU ITERAMBERE (JADF) Muri iki cyiciro hari hateganyijwe kugenzura imitangire ya serivisi mu nzego za leta, iz’abikorera n’iz’imiryango itari iya leta; gukora ubukangurambaga ku mitangire ya serivisi binyuze muri gahunda ya “Nk’Uwikorera”; gukora ibiganiro n’inzego za leta, iz’abikorera n’imiryango itari iya leta bijyanye no kunoza imitangire ya serivisi; gukurikirana uko inzego zishyira mu bikorwa ibipimo by’imitangire ya serivisi; kumenyekanisha ibipimo by’imitangire ya

gukora ibiganiro n’inzego za leta, iz’abikorera n’imiryango itari iya leta bijyanye no kunoza imitangire ya serivisi; gukurikirana uko inzego zishyira mu bikorwa ibipimo by’imitangire ya serivisi; kumenyekanisha ibipimo by’imitangire ya serivisi; gukurikirana ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ibipimo by’imitangire ya serivisi; gukora isesengura ryimbitse ku miyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu rwego rwihariye. Hari hateganyijwe kandi gutegura ibikorwa by’amarushanwa y’ umurenge kagame cup (UKC) no gutanga ibihembo; gukora ubukangurambaga ku miyoborere, imitangire ya serivisi no kuzamura uruhare rw’abaturage binyuze muri gahunda “imiyoborere twifuza “; guhuza ibikorwa bya gahunda yo kwigenzura no kwigiranaho (Pr-Pl); kugirana ibiganiro n’urubyiruko rwiga mu mashuri yisumbuye, kaminuza n’amashuri makuru hagamijwe kwimakaza amahame y’imiyoborere ndetse no gutegura inama ziteganywa n’amabwiriza y’ihuriro ry’abafatanyabikorwa mu iterambere (JADF). Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yakoze isuzuma ry’imitangire ya serivisi z’ubutaka. Iri suzuma ryakozwe mu turere cumi na dutatu (13) turimo dutatu (3) tw’umujyi wa Kigali, dutandatu (6) dufite imijyi yunganira Kigali na tune (4)

yakoze isuzuma ry’imitangire ya serivisi z’ubutaka. Iri suzuma ryakozwe mu turere cumi na dutatu (13) turimo dutatu (3) tw’umujyi wa Kigali, dutandatu (6) dufite imijyi yunganira Kigali na tune (4) aho abaturage bashima serivisi z’ubutaka ku gipimo cyo hasi nk’uko byagaragajwe muri CRC ya 2023. Hasuzumwe serivisi zijyanye no kwandikisha ubutaka, gutanga ibyangombwa byo kubaka no guhererekanya uburenganzira ku butaka. Iri suzuma ryakorewe mu nzego 92 zirimo Ikigo cy’Igihugu gishinzwe ubutaka, Umujyi wa Kigali, uturere, imirenge n’utugari hanabazwa abaturage 2.228 basabye izi serivisi. Mu gukora isuzuma hagendewe ku bipimofatizo by’imitangire ya serivisi birindwi (7) bikurikira: gutanga serivisi ku gihe, kubahiriza amabwiriza y’imitangire ya serivisi, korohereza abasaba serivisi kuzigeraho, uburyo bunoze bwo gusubiza ibibazo by’abakugana, kwita ku bakugana, ubushobozi no kwizerwa by’utanga serivisi n’ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Ibyavuye mu igenzura bigaragaza ko serivisi zijyanye no kwandikisha ubutaka zishimwa ku gipimo 75,39%, izo gutanga ibyangombwa byo kubaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 76,72% naho izo

by’utanga serivisi n’ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Ibyavuye mu igenzura bigaragaza ko serivisi zijyanye no kwandikisha ubutaka zishimwa ku gipimo 75,39%, izo gutanga ibyangombwa byo kubaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 76,72% naho izo guhererekanya uburenganzira ku butaka zishimwa ku gipimo cya 75,76%. ▶ Karongi ▶ Nyanza ▶ Burera ▶ Rusizi ▶ Abakozi ba WASAC na MINUBUMWE ▶ Abayobozi b’uturere ▶ Abajyanama mu nama njyanama y’akarere ▶ Abayobozi b’ibitaro by’uturere ▶ Abakozi b’akarere ▶ Abayobozi b’amadini/amatorero afite ibigo by’ubuvuzi ▶ Abahagarariye urugaga rw’abikorera mu turere (PSF) ▶ Ba perezida b’inama njyanama z’imirenge ▶ Abayobozi b’Amahuriro y’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere (JADF), ▶ Abayobozi b’amashami ku karere ▶ Abanyamabanga nshingwabikorwa b’imirenge ▶ Abakozi bashinzwe imari n’ubutegetsi mu mirenge ▶ Abanyamabanga nshingwabikorwa b’utugali ▶ Abahagarariye ihuriro ry’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere (RIC) ▶ Abayobozi b’ibigo nderabuzima ▶ Abayobozi b’imirenge SACCO Abitabiriye bose ni 2.809 Mu rwego rwo kubongerera ubumenyi ku mahame y’imitangire ya serivisi no kubakangurira kuyashyira mu bikorwa kugira ngo serivisi zirusheho kunoga no kunyura abo zigenewe, RGB yatanze ibiganiro ku mitangire ya serivisi ku bayobozi n’abakozi banyuranye mu ntara zose n’Umujyi wa Kigali binyuze muri gahunda ya “Nk’uwikorera”. Ibiganiro byitabiriwe n’abaturutse mu nzego za Leta, iz’abikorera

RGB yatanze ibiganiro ku mitangire ya serivisi ku bayobozi n’abakozi banyuranye mu ntara zose n’Umujyi wa Kigali binyuze muri gahunda ya “Nk’uwikorera”. Ibiganiro byitabiriwe n’abaturutse mu nzego za Leta, iz’abikorera n’imiryango itari iya Leta nk’uko bigaragara mu mbonerahamwe ikurikira: Ibi biganiro byabereye mu turere twa Kicukiro, Kayonza, Musanze, Karongi na Nyanza. Byitabiriwe n’abayobozi b’uturere, abayobozi b’ibitaro by’uturere, Abayobozi b’amadini/amatorero afite ibigo by’ubuvuzi, abahagarariye urugaga rw’abikorera mu turere (PSF), abayobozi b’amashami ku karere, abashinzwe imiyoborere myiza mu turere, abayobozi b’amahuriro y’abafatanyabikorwa mu iterambere (JADF), abanyamabanga nshingwabikorwa b’imirenge, abahagarariye ihuriro ry’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere (RIC), abayobozi b’ibigo nderabuzima, n’abayobozi b’imirenge SACCO. Abitabiriye ibiganiro bagaragarijwe ibyavuye mu isuzuma ryakozwe na RGB ku mitangire ya serivisi mu rwego rw’ubuzima. Ibi babishingiyeho bafata ingamba zo kunoza iyubahirizwa ry’amabwiriza y’imitangire ya serivisi, kwakira neza no kwita ku babagana ndetse no kwihutisha serivisi. Ibyo bipimo birindwi byashyizweho binifashishwa mu igenzura ry’imitangire ya serivisi ni ibi bikurikira: Gutanga serivisi ku gihe, Kubahiriza amabwiriza y’imitangire ya serivisi, Korohereza abasaba serivisi kuzigeraho, Uburyo bunoze bwo gusubiza ibibazo by’abakugana, Kwita ku bakugana, Ubushobozi no kwizerwa by’utanga serivisi n’Ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Hasuwe inzego za Leta

gihe, Kubahiriza amabwiriza y’imitangire ya serivisi, Korohereza abasaba serivisi kuzigeraho, Uburyo bunoze bwo gusubiza ibibazo by’abakugana, Kwita ku bakugana, Ubushobozi no kwizerwa by’utanga serivisi n’Ibikoresho n’ibikorwaremezo. Hasuwe inzego za Leta zirindwi (7) hasuzumwa ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ibikubiye muri raporo ku bipimo fatizo by’imitangire ya serivisi izo nzego zatanze. Imbonerahamwe ikurikira iragaragaza ibyavuye mu igenzura: Nk’uko bigaragara mu mbonerahamwe ya munani (8), igenzura ryagaragaje ko Minisiteri y’ubuzima (MoH) yashyize mu bikorwa ibipimo fatizo by’ imitangire ya serivisi ku kigero cyo hejuru cya 95%, mu gihe Ikigo cy’Igihugu gishinzwe Mine, Peteroli na Gazi (RMB) cyabishyize mu bikorwa ku kigero cyo hasi cya 59,5%. Oya 14 MINEDUC Oya 15 RPPA Oya Nk’uko bigaragara mu mbonerahamwe iri hejuru, inzego icyenda (9) ni zo zatanze raporo nk’uko byari byasabwe naho esheshatu (6) zisigaye nta raporo zatanze. --- PAJIRI 50 --- URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 38 Ku bufatanye n’umuryango Imbuto Foundation, Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere (RGB) rwakoze isuzuma ku mikorere ya JADF. Iri suzuma ryakorewe mu turere 15 hibandwa ku byakozwe mu gihe cy’imyaka itanu (2018-2023). Uturere dutatu twatoranijwe muri buri ntara naho mu Mujyi wa Kigali, hasuzumwe imikorere ya JADF mu turere twose uko ari dutatu. Uturere twakorewemo isuzuma ni: Burera, Musanze, Rulindo, Huye, Nyamagabe, Nyanza, Kayonza, Rwamagana, Bugesera, Nyabihu, Nyamasheke, Rusizi, Gasabo, Kicukiro na Nyarugenge. Isuzuma ryerekanye ko 76% by’abanyamuryango ba JADF babajijwe bayimazemo nibura imyaka itanu (5). Ibi birerekana ko benshi mu babajijwe bafite ubumenyi buhagije ku mikorere ya JADF. Ikindi cyagaragaye ni uko 62,3% by’abanyamuryango ba JADF bafite ibikorwa mu nkingi y’imibereho myiza, mu

itanu (5). Ibi birerekana ko benshi mu babajijwe bafite ubumenyi buhagije ku mikorere ya JADF. Ikindi cyagaragaye ni uko 62,3% by’abanyamuryango ba JADF bafite ibikorwa mu nkingi y’imibereho myiza, mu gihe 28,3% bafite ibikorwa mu nkingi y’ubukungu naho 9,4% bakagira ibikorwa mu nkingi y’imiyoborere. IMIKORERE Y’INZENGO ZA JADF Ku birebana n’imikorere y’inzego za JADF hasuzumwe inteko rusange na komite nyobozi. IMIKORERE Y’INTEKO RUSANGE Amabwiriza ya Minisitiri w’intebe ashyiraho ihuriro ry’abafatanyabikorwa mu iterambere ateganya ko inama y’Inteko rusange ya JADF iterana kabiri (2) mu mwaka bihwanye n’inama 10 mu myaka itanu. Isuzuma ryerekanye ko uturere dutanu (33,3%) gusa kuri 15 ari two twakoze inama 10 ziteganyijwe. Ikindi n’uko uturere tune (27%) muri 15 twasuzumwe tutaremeza amategeko ngengamikorere yiyahiriye ya JADF asobanura imikorere yayo n’iya za komisiyo ziyigize. Inteko rusange za JADF z’uturere umunani (53,3%) kuri 15 twasuzumwe zemeje buri mwaka gahunda y’ibikorwa n’ingengo y’imari bya JADF, mu gihe uturere tune (26,7%)

imikorere yayo n’iya za komisiyo ziyigize. Inteko rusange za JADF z’uturere umunani (53,3%) kuri 15 twasuzumwe zemeje buri mwaka gahunda y’ibikorwa n’ingengo y’imari bya JADF, mu gihe uturere tune (26,7%) tutari dufite gahunda ngarukamwaka y’ibikorwa bya JADF. Ku bijyanye no gutanga raporo ziteganywa n’amabwiriza, uturere tubiri (13,3%) kuri cumi na dutanu ni two twatanze raporo zose ziteganyijwe mu gihe cy’imyaka itanu. IMIKORERE YA KOMITE NYOBOZI Amabwiriza ya Minisitiri w’intebe ashyiraho ihuriro ry’abafatanyabikorwa mu iterambere ateganya ko inama ya Komite nyobozi ya JADF iterana buri gihembwe bihwanye n’inama 20 mu myaka itanu. Isuzuma ryerekanye ko uturere dutanu gusa (33,3%) kuri 15 aritwo twakoze inama 20 mu myaka itanu. Ku bijyanye no gukurikirana ibikorwa by’abafatanyabikorwa, uturere tubiri (13,3%) nitwo twakoze iki gikorwa buri mwaka mu gihe cy’imyaka itanu. [Ishusho iboneka kuri iyi pajiri: image_0] --- PAJIRI 52 --- URWEGO RW’IGIHUGU RW’ IMIYOBORERE 40 Mu rwego rwo kwimakaza imiyoborere myiza, Urwego rw’Igihugu rw’Imiyoborere rufatanyije na Minisiteri y’Ubutegetsi bw’Igihugu, Minisiteri ya Siporo, intara n’Umujyi wa Kigali, uturere n’imirenge buri mwaka bategura amarushanwa y’imiyoborere myiza yitwa “Umurenge Kagame Cup”. Amarushanwa yo muri uyu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024 yitabiriwe n’amakipe y’abagabo n’abagore mu mikino ikurikira: umupira w’amaguru, sit-ball, volleyball, basketball, gusiganwa ku magare, gusiganwa ku maguru, gusimbuka urukiramende no kubuguza. Amarushanwa y’Umurenge Kagame Cup agamije guteza imbere amahame y’imiyoborere myiza binyuze mu mikino, kuzamura imibereho myiza y’abaturage, guteza imbere impano z’abaturage hibandwa ku rubyiruko, gukangurira abaturage kwitabira gahunda zibateza imbere, guteza

y’Umurenge Kagame Cup agamije guteza imbere amahame y’imiyoborere myiza binyuze mu mikino, kuzamura imibereho myiza y’abaturage, guteza imbere impano z’abaturage hibandwa ku rubyiruko, gukangurira abaturage kwitabira gahunda zibateza imbere, guteza imbere ubufatanye no kwigiranaho mu nzego z’ibanze. Muri uyu mwaka, aya marushanwa yari afite insanganyamatsiko igira iti: “Imyaka 30 y’imiyoborere ishyira umuturage ku isonga”. Ubutumwa bwatanzwe muri aya marushanwa bwibanze ku gukangurira abaturage kugira uruhare mu bibakorerwa, kunoza imitangire ya serivisi, gukangurira urubyiruko guteza imbere impano zabo no AMARUSHANWA Y’ UMURENGE KAGAME CUP (UKC) 1.2.6. kwirinda ingeso mbi zirimo ikoreshwa ry’ibiyobyabwenge, ubusinzi n’andi makosa ababuza kwiteza imbere. Ibi biganiro kandi byari bigamije gukangurira abayobozi guha umuturage umwanya ukwiye mu igenamigambi no mu ishyirwa mu bikorwa n’ikurikiranabikorwa rya gahunda zimugenewe. Ibi biganiro byanyujijwe mu nteko z’abaturage mu Mirenge ya Mukarange

kandi byari bigamije gukangurira abayobozi guha umuturage umwanya ukwiye mu igenamigambi no mu ishyirwa mu bikorwa n’ikurikiranabikorwa rya gahunda zimugenewe. Ibi biganiro byanyujijwe mu nteko z’abaturage mu Mirenge ya Mukarange mu Karere ka Kayonza, Muhazi mu Karere ka Rwamagana, Jabana mu Karere ka Gasabo, Rugerero mu Karere ka Rubavu na Cyuve mu Karere ka Musanze. Gahunda yo kwigenzura no kwigiranaho, igamije kunoza imitangire ya serivisi n’imicungire y’umutungo mu bigo bya Leta bitagenerwa ingengo y’imari n’itegeko (Non-budget agencies), birimo imirenge, utugari, ibigo nderabuzima, amashuri abanza n’ay’isumbuye. Iyi gahunda ikorerwa ku rwego rw’umurenge, ikibanda ku nkingi enye arizo: aho gukorera haboneye, imitangire ya serivisi, imicungire y’imari n’umutungo bya leta n’imicungire ya gahunda za leta zigamije guhindura imibereho y’abaturage. Ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’iyi gahunda rigirwamo uruhare n’inzego zitandukanye. RGB ishinzwe gufasha mu kubaka ubushobozi bw’inzego zirebwa n’iyi gahunda, gushyiraho imirongo ngenderwaho mu bikwiye kwibandwaho mu gukora igenzura no gukurikirana ku rwego rw’igihugu ibikorwa

gahunda rigirwamo uruhare n’inzego zitandukanye. RGB ishinzwe gufasha mu kubaka ubushobozi bw’inzego zirebwa n’iyi gahunda, gushyiraho imirongo ngenderwaho mu bikwiye kwibandwaho mu gukora igenzura no gukurikirana ku rwego rw’igihugu ibikorwa no gukora isuzuma ry’iyi gahunda. RGB ishinzwe kandi kwakira no guhuza raporo zivuye ku ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali ndetse no gutanga inama ku bikwiye kunozwa. Ku bijyanye n’inshingano yo gukurikirana ibikorwa, gukora isuzuma ry’iyi gahunda no guhuza raporo zivuye ku ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali, RGB yakiriye raporo z’ibikorwa byo kwigenzura no kwigiranaho byateguwe n’intara n’Umujyi wa Kigali. Abakozi ba RGB basuye Intara y’Amajyepfo n’Umujyi wa Kigali bakorana mu gusesengura raporo zavuye mu turere. Nyuma yo kwakira raporo z’intara n’Umujyi wa Kigali, RGB yarazisesenguye ivanamo raporo y’umwaka igaragaza ibyakozwe muri iyi gahunda, inatanga inama z’ibikeneye kunozwa. gahunda, inatanga inama z’ibikeneye kunozwa. y’ibiro byo gukoreramo, kizimyamoto n’abarinda umutekano, gusana no gufata neza inyubako za Leta. IMITANGIRE YA SERIVISI MURI GAHUNDA YO KWIGENZURA NO KWIGIRANAHO Muri iyi nkingi hasuzumwa uburyo abagana urwego bakirwa, amahame n’amabwiriza agenga itangwa rya serivisi, igihe bitwara ngo usaba serivisi ayibone, imihigo y’ikigo, n’uburyo bufasha abaturage kugaragaza uko babona imitangire ya serivsi. IMICUNGIRE Y’IMARI N’UMUTUNGO BYA LETA Muri iyi nkingi hasuzumwa uburyo igenamigambi n’ingengo y’imari bitegurwa, uburyo urwego rwishakira umutungo bwite n’uturuka ahandi, ibikorwa bigendaho ingengo y’imari, ibitabo na raporo by’ibaruramari, imicungire y’ibikoresho, imicungire y’abakozi, imincungire y’imitungo yimukanwa n’itimukanwa, imikorere y’akanama gatanga amasoko n’imitangire y’amasoko. RGB, ku bufatanye n’umuryango nyarwanda utari uwa Leta “Girls Leaders Forum” yagiranye ibiganiro

n’ibigo bidafite imihigo (32,2%), kutubahiriza gahunda y’amasoko (28,8%) no kudakora raporo y’imari hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga (software) ryabugenewe (28,1%). RGB, ku bufatanye n’umuryango nyarwanda utari uwa Leta “Girls Leaders Forum” yagiranye ibiganiro n’urubyiruko ruhagarariye abandi rwibumbiye muri “clubs” z’imiyoborere (Good Governance Clubs) mu mashuri yisumbuye, amashuri makuru na kaminuza mu rwego rwo kubashishikariza kugira uruhare mu kwimakaza imiyoborere myiza, imitangire ya serivisi inoze n’uruhare rwabo mu kwihutisha iterambere. Abitabiriye ibiganiro biyemeje gukangurira bagenzi babo kurushaho kugira uruhare mu miyoborere ibereye u Rwanda no mu iterambere rirambye. Ku bufatanye n’ubuyobozi bw’Intara, Umujyi wa Kigali, Uturere n’abagize Ihuriro ry’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere, RGB yateguye inama ziteganywa n’amabwiriza ya Minisitiri w’Intebe agenga imikorere ya JADF. Ni muri urwo rwego, hakozwe inama nyunguranabitekerezo eshanu (5) imwe muri buri Ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali. Hanakozwe inama mpuzabikorwa enye (4) nk’uko byari biteganyijwe. Izi nama zari zigamije, gukurikirana, guhuriza hamwe ibikorwa, kujya inama ku cyarushaho guteza imbere uruhare rwa JADF

buri Ntara n’Umujyi wa Kigali. Hanakozwe inama mpuzabikorwa enye (4) nk’uko byari biteganyijwe. Izi nama zari zigamije, gukurikirana, guhuriza hamwe ibikorwa, kujya inama ku cyarushaho guteza imbere uruhare rwa JADF mu iterambere rirambye no guhugura abakozi bashinzwe gukurikirana ibikorwa by’abafatanyabikorwa mu turere. Muri izi nama nyunguranabitekerezo, haganiriwe ku ruhare rw’abafatanyabikorwa mu guteza imbere igihugu no gushyigikira iterambere ry’Uturere bakoreramo. Hagaragajwe kandi ahagomba kongerwa imbaraga harimo: kongera imishinga itanga akazi cyane cyane ku rubyiruko, kurwanya imirire mibi n’igwingira ry’abana, kurwanya amakimbirane mu miryango, kurwanya ikoreshwa ry’ibiyobyabwenge n’izindi ngeso mbi ziyobya urubyiruko. Abitabiriye inama bagaragarijwe ibyavuye mu bugenzuzi bwakozwe na RGB ku mikorere y’imiryango itari iya Leta n’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere, bagirwa inama zo kunoza ibirebana no kubahiriza amategeko agenga imikorere yabo no kunoza imicungire y’imari n’abakozi. Muri izi nama kandi haganiriwe ku mahame agenga Ihuriro ry’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere ry’Akarere, biyemeza kunoza ubufatanye mu gutegurira hamwe gahunda z’iterambere, kuzishyira mu bikorwa no

no kunoza imicungire y’imari n’abakozi. Muri izi nama kandi haganiriwe ku mahame agenga Ihuriro ry’Abafatanyabikorwa mu Iterambere ry’Akarere, biyemeza kunoza ubufatanye mu gutegurira hamwe gahunda z’iterambere, kuzishyira mu bikorwa no kuzigenzura, hagamijwe impinduka mu mibereho y’abaturage. Hari hanateganyijwe ibiganiro n’imiryango itari iya leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere bijyanye n’imiyoborere n’iyubahirizwa ry‘amategeko; no kongerera ubushobozi imiryango itari iya leta, ishingiye ku myemerere n’imitwe ya politiki kugira ngo irusheho kugira uruhare mu kuzamura ubukungu n’imibereho myiza by’abaturage. RGB yagiranye ibiganiro n’Ubuyobozi bwa Rwanda Inter-Religious Council (RIC) kuva ku rwego rw’igihugu kugeza ku rwego rw’akarere. Ibi biganiro byibanze ku ruhare rw’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere mu kwimakaza imiyoborere myiza, kubahiriza amategeko, kurwanya ibyaha by’iyezandonke, ibyo gutera inkunga iterabwoba n’iby’ikwirakwiza ry’intwaro za kirimbuzi. By’umwihariko, RGB yagaragarije abitabiriye ibi biganiro ibyavuye mu

ruhare rw’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere mu kwimakaza imiyoborere myiza, kubahiriza amategeko, kurwanya ibyaha by’iyezandonke, ibyo gutera inkunga iterabwoba n’iby’ikwirakwiza ry’intwaro za kirimbuzi. By’umwihariko, RGB yagaragarije abitabiriye ibi biganiro ibyavuye mu igenzura ryakozwe mu miryango ishingiye ku myemerere hasuzumwa imiyoborere, kubahiriza amategeko no gushyiraho ingamba zo kurwanya ibyaha by’iyezandonke, ibyo gutera inkunga imitwe y’iterabwoba n’iby’ubucuruzi bw’intwaro ntoya. Abitabiriye inama bashishikarijwe gushyiraho ingamba zo gukumira urusaku no gufata amazi aturuka ku nyubako zisengerwamo. Banibukijwe kubahiriza ibiteganywa n’itegeko n°72/2018 ryo ku wa 31/08/2018 rigena imitunganyirize n’imikorere by’imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere cyane cyane ku bijyanye n’amashuri asabwa abayobora iyi miryango. Nyuma y’ibiganiro, hatanzwe ibyifuzonama birimo kurushaho kwimakaza imiyoborere myiza, kubahiriza amategeko, gushyiraho ingamba zo kurwanya ibyaha by’iyezandonke, ibyo gutera inkunga imitwe y’iterabwoba n’iby’ubucuruzi bw’intwaro ntoya ndetse no gushyiraho ingamba zo kugabanya urusaku rutezwa n’inzu zisengerwamo. Izi mpinduka zabaye mu manota zatewe ahanini n’amavugurura yakozwe mu buryo ubu bushakashatsi bukorwamo aho uburemere bwashyizwe cyane ku ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ibiteganywa n’amatageko mu gihe mu bwabubanjirije hahabwaga uburemere kubaho kw’amategeko ubwabyo byatumaga amanota azamuka. Muri RMB 2024 Igipimo cy’Ishyirwaho ry’amategeko na politiki byorohereza

uburemere bwashyizwe cyane ku ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ibiteganywa n’amatageko mu gihe mu bwabubanjirije hahabwaga uburemere kubaho kw’amategeko ubwabyo byatumaga amanota azamuka. Muri RMB 2024 Igipimo cy’Ishyirwaho ry’amategeko na politiki byorohereza imikorere y’itangazamakuru ni cyo cyaje imbere kuri 90% mu gihe igipimo cy’Ubushobozi n’ubunyamwuga bw’itangazamakuru ari cyo cyaje inyuma kuri 60,7%. Mu bibazo RMB 2024 yagaragaje bikwiye kwitabwaho by’umwihariko harimo ikibazo cy’amikoro adahagije y’ibitangazamakuru n’abanyamakuru, ubunyamwuga buke mu banyamakuru bamwe na bamwe, imbogamizi mu kubona amakuru mu nzego zitandukanye, umubare w’abanyamakuru b’igitsina gore ukiri hasi n’ikibazo cy’abanyamakuru bakoresha rurimi rw’ikinyarawanda mu buryo butanoze. Buri myaka ibiri RGB ikora ubushakashatsi bugaragaza ibipimo by’uko itangazamakuru rihagaze mu Rwanda. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, hakozwe ubu bushakashatsi ku nshuro ya gatanu. Incamake y’ibyavuye muri ubu bushakashatsi bigaragara mu mbonerahamwe ikurikira. Iyo nkunga kandi yatumye ARJ ifasha ibitangazamakuru n’amashyirahamwe y’abanyamakuru bitandukanye kubona aho bikorera haboneye harimo n’ibikoresho nka mudasobwa zifite interineti ihoraho. Indi nkunga ya 12.364.650 z’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda yatanzwe muri gahunda yo gushyigikira itangizwa rya koperative y’abanyamakuru (Media Development Cooperative-MEDECO) igamije iterambere ry’urwego rw’itangazamakuru n’imibereho myiza y’abanyamakuru. Urwego rw’Abanyamakuru Bigenzura (RMC) rwahawe amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 149.116.345 yakoreshwejwe mu kwishyura imishahara y’abakozi, ibikoresho no kubaka ubushobozi kugira ngo rubashe gusohoza inshingano zo

ry’urwego rw’itangazamakuru n’imibereho myiza y’abanyamakuru. Urwego rw’Abanyamakuru Bigenzura (RMC) rwahawe amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 149.116.345 yakoreshwejwe mu kwishyura imishahara y’abakozi, ibikoresho no kubaka ubushobozi kugira ngo rubashe gusohoza inshingano zo gukurikirana iyubahirizwa ry’amahame agenga umwuga w’itangazamakuru no gutanga ibyangombwa ku bitangazamakuru no ku banyamakuru. Igikorwa cyo kubakira RMC ubushobozi, cyatumye ibasha gukurikirana iyubahirizwa ry’amahame y’umwuga w’itangazamakuru, aho yakiriye ikanakemura ibirego 17 byiganjemo ibirebana n’abanyamakuru barezwe gutandukira amahame y’umwuga. Urwego rw’abanyamakuru bigenzura (RMC) rwanasesenguye inkuru n’ibiganiro by’ibitangazamakuru 20. Hagaragayemo amakosa 51 ajyanye no gutandukira amahame y’umwuga, hatangwa inama ku bitangazamakuru yagaragayemo. RGB yanateye inkunga y’amafaranga y’ u Rwanda 46.216.973 Ishyirahamwe ry’abagore bakora umwuga w’itangazamakuru mu Rwanda (ARFEM). Iyi nkunga yakoreshejwe mu kubaka ubushobozi bw’iri shyirahamwe, mu gukora inyandiko ziyobora iri shyirahamwe mu mikorere yaryo no guhugura abanyamuryango. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yakiriye mu bihe bitandukanye amatsinda 26 aturutse mu bihugu bikurikira; Ghana, Zambia, Burundi, Burkina Faso, Malawi, Nigeria, Zambia, Kenya,

u Rwanda rugeze mu iterambere n’imiyoborere. Mu mwaka wa 2023-2024, RGB yakiriye mu bihe bitandukanye amatsinda 26 aturutse mu bihugu bikurikira; Ghana, Zambia, Burundi, Burkina Faso, Malawi, Nigeria, Zambia, Kenya, Mali, Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Uganda, Liberia, Somalia, Sudani y’Amajyepfo, Zimbabwe, Ubwongereza, Zanzibar na Senegal. Ibiganiro RGB yagiranye n’aya matsinda byibanze kuri ibi bikurikira: Ishusho y’imiyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu Rwanda, uruhare rw’imitangire ya serivisi mu mibereho myiza n’iterambere, imiyoborere y’inzego z’ibanze mu Rwanda, imikorere y’imiryango itari iya leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere no kuri politiki yo kwishakamo ibisubizo. 1.5.1. AMATSINDA ATURUTSE HANZE Y’U RWANDA RGB YAKIRIYE RGB yagiranye ibiganiro n’abafatanyabikorwa bo mu byiciro binyuranye birimo: inzego za leta, imiryango itari iya leta, imiryango ishingiye ku myemerere n’amatsinda aturutse hanze y’u Rwanda. Ibi biganiro byibanze ku miyoborere, imitangire ya serivisi, uburyo bwo kwishakamo ibisubizo, imikorere n’iterambere by’itangazamakuru, imiryango itari iya leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere. Ibi biganiro RGB yatanze byibanze ku ngingo zitandukanye zirimo: Imiyoborere

WASAC Icyiciro cya II n’icya III, Inama y’Inararibonye (REAF Council) n’ikiganiro mu mwiherero w’Inama Njyanama y’Akarere ka Kayonza n’abafatanyabikorwa bako. Ibi biganiro RGB yatanze byibanze ku ngingo zitandukanye zirimo: Imiyoborere myiza n’uburyo bwo kwishakamo ibisubizo, uruhare rw’ubuyobozi bureba kure mu gushishikariza abaturage kwikemurira ibibazo, kwimakaza amahoro n’iterambere mu gihugu kivuye mu ntambara, uko u Rwanda rwiyubatse nyuma ya Jenoside yakorewe Abatutsi mu 1994, kurwanya ruswa n’akarengane, imitangire ya serivisi n’uruhare rw’abaturage mu bibakorerwa. Binyuze mu bitangazamakuru bitandukanye, RGB yatanze ibiganiro byibanze ku ngingo zinyuranye zijyanye n’ibikorwa n’inshingano za RGB, ari zo: Imikorere y’imiryango itari iya leta n’ishingiye ku myemerere; imitangire ya serivisi; guteza imbere amahame y’imiyoborere myiza; igipimo cy’imiyoborere mu Rwanda; iterambere ry’urwego rw’itangazamakuru; ndetse n’uruhare rw’abaturage mu bibakorerwa n’uburenganzira bwo kubona amakuru. 1.5.2. Muri ibyo, harimo gukurikirana ishyirwa mu bikorwa rya gahunda y’ibikorwa, ingengo y’imari n’amasoko by’umwaka wa 2023-2024 no gutegura iby’umwaka wa 2024- 2025, gukurikirana ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ingamba zo kwimakaza ihame ry’uburinganire muri gahunda n’ibikorwa bya RGB n’iby’abafatanyabikorwa. 98% byarakozwe birarangira. Igikorwa cyo gutegura raporo y’ubugenzuzi bw’imari ya buri gihembwe ni cyo kitakozwe bitewe n’uko nta mukozi ubishinzwe (internal auditor) uhari. Ni muri urwo rwego, ihame ry’uburinganire ryitabwaho mu gutoranya abakorerwaho ubushakashatsi n’amasuzuma ndetse no mu isesengura ry’ibyavuyemo. Ubushakashatsi ku miyoborere n’imitangire ya serivisi mu nzego zegerejwe abaturage (CRC), bwakorewe ku bantu 10.538, muri bo 6.152 (58.4%) bari abagore naho 4.386 (41.6%) bari abagabo. Muri CRC 2024, ibirebana n’ihame ry’uburinganire n’ubwuzuzanye mu muryango nyarwanda biri mu byitaweho. By’umwihariko, ubushakashatsi ku

ku bantu 10.538, muri bo 6.152 (58.4%) bari abagore naho 4.386 (41.6%) bari abagabo. Muri CRC 2024, ibirebana n’ihame ry’uburinganire n’ubwuzuzanye mu muryango nyarwanda biri mu byitaweho. By’umwihariko, ubushakashatsi ku gipimo cy’imiyoborere mu Rwanda (RGS) gikora isesengura ryihariye ku iyubahirizwa ry’ihame ry’uburinganire hagati y’abagabo n’abagore mu nzego zifata ibyemezo haba mu nzego za leta, iz’abikorera ndetse no mu miryango itari iya leta. Ihame ry’uburinganire kandi ryitaweho mu bikorwa byo kubaka ubushobozi bw’imiryango nyarwanda itari iya Leta. Ibi byagaragariye mu gutoranya imiryango yagombaga guhabwa inkunga yo gushyira mu bikorwa imishinga yayo. Imiryango 31 yagaragaje ko mu bagenerwabikorwa bayo 3.128 harimo abagore 2.105 n’abagabo 1.023. Ku bijyanye n’amahugurwa yahawe abahagarariye imiryango itari iya Leta, abayitabiriye bose bari 80 barimo abagore 41 n’abagabo 39. Mu rwego rwo kwimakaza ihame ry’uburinganire mu rwego rw’itangazamakuru, RGB ku bufatanye n’abafatanyabikorwa yashyizeho ibihembo ngarukamwaka byagenewe abanyamakuru b’indashyikirwa (DJA) harimo ibyihariye byagenewe abakoze inkuru ziteza imbere ihame ry’uburinganire

39. Mu rwego rwo kwimakaza ihame ry’uburinganire mu rwego rw’itangazamakuru, RGB ku bufatanye n’abafatanyabikorwa yashyizeho ibihembo ngarukamwaka byagenewe abanyamakuru b’indashyikirwa (DJA) harimo ibyihariye byagenewe abakoze inkuru ziteza imbere ihame ry’uburinganire hagati y’abagabo n’abagore mu itangazamakuru. Harimo kandi igihembo cyihariye cyagenewe umunyamakuru w’umugore wahize abandi. Ku birebana n’ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’amasoko, mu mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, RGB yari yateganyije gutanga amasoko 28. Amasoko yatanzwe akarangira ni 27 (96,42%). Isoko ritatanzwe ni iryo kugura amavuta y’imodoka (fuel) kuko ryatangajwe hakabura ba rwiyemezamirimo baripiganira. 1.6.2. mwaka w’ingengo y’imari wa 2023-2024, Umugenzuzi Mukuru w’Imari ya Leta yakoze ubugenzuzi bw’imikoreshereze y’ingengo y’imari RGB yahawe mu mwaka wa 2022-2023. Ibyavuye muri ubu bugenzuzi byerekana ko RGB yabonye raporo ntamakemwa (unqualified audit opinion) ku mikoreshereze y’ingengo y’imari itangwa na Leta n’iy’imishinga, haba mu mitegurire ya raporo z’imari (financial statements audit), iyubahirizwa ry’amategeko (compliance audit) ndetse no kudasesagura umutungo wa Leta (value for money audit). Iyi raporo igaragaza kandi ko RGB yashyize mu bikorwa ku gipimo cy’ijana ku ijana (100%) inama yari yagiriwe mu bugenzuzi bwa 2021-2022. Ku bufatanye bw’abahagarariye imiryango itari iya leta n’abakozi ba RGB hateguwe igikorwa cyo Kwibuka ku nshuro ya 30 Jenoside yakorewe Abatutsi mu 1994. Abitabiriye iki gikorwa basuye Urwibutso rwa Jenoside rwa Kigali ku Gisozi, banahabwa ikiganiro ku ruhare rwa sosiyete sivile mu gukumira no kurwanya ipfobya n’ihakana rya Jenoside yakorewe Abatutsi ndetse n’ingengabitekerezo ya Jenoside. PART II: ACADEMICS 5 --- PAJIRI 7 --- PART I: WELCOME TO ALU 1.1. ABOUT THIS HANDBOOK Welcome to African Leadership University. For returning students, welcome back. This handbook is intended to serve as a guide for undergraduate students at the African Leadership University (ALU). The handbook contains in-depth information about our academic programmes, academic community, learning environment, and relevant policies and procedures at ALU. This handbook serves as a ready reference for you to consult in a conscientious effort to abide by the procedures contained herein. Although the Student Handbook provides basic information, additional material and updates may also be found in newsletters, programme documentation, and communication

conscientious effort to abide by the procedures contained herein. Although the Student Handbook provides basic information, additional material and updates may also be found in newsletters, programme documentation, and communication from the administration and leadership. The institution reserves the right to update the document, including academic requirements, regulations, policies and procedures. The appendices hereto shall form an integral part of this Handbook. 1.2. OUR ORIGINS African Leadership University began with what many called an impossible idea. We had a vision for a new kind of academic experience — one where students declared missions; where experiential learning was incorporated into the curriculum; and where learning how to learn replaced memorising facts and figures. This would be education reimagined, launching a new generation of ethical, entrepreneurial leaders and creating an unstoppable wave of young Africans prepared to transform our continent for the better. PART II: ACADEMICS 6 --- PAJIRI 8 --- In 2015, we broke ground at our very first campus in Mauritius. In 2017, a new campus was opened in Rwanda. Today, ALU has over - 2,700 students enrolled. While we are gratified by the development of the institution and its recognitions, our most treasured triumphs are those of our students. Graduates have gone on to do the hard things that will transform our continent and the world, whether starting their own education programs in their home country or representing Africa at global companies like Google. Esi Otchere (Class of 2016) told us, “ALU sparked my desire for entrepreneurship without a doubt. I gained the confidence to take risks.” We’re proud to

global companies like Google. Esi Otchere (Class of 2016) told us, “ALU sparked my desire for entrepreneurship without a doubt. I gained the confidence to take risks.” We’re proud to see our students developing a spirit for taking risks; indeed, ALU would not exist without that incredible spirit. We look forward to watching our students continue to create a ripple of change in their communities, throughout Africa, and across the globe for the next five years — and many more years to come. 1.3. OUR VALUES You are now part of a community that has established values that inform how we behave, what decisions we make, and what we prioritise on a daily basis. Ownership We take responsibility for our own actions and words knowing that they have an impact on others. We take initiative to solve problems in our community and to see hard things through. Restless Excellence We

own actions and words knowing that they have an impact on others. We take initiative to solve problems in our community and to see hard things through. We strive continuously to see how we can do better so we can unlock doors for others to follow through. MISSIONS Students at ALU declare missions that address one or more of Africa's Grand Challenges and/or Opportunities. This mission will help shape the approach you take to your learning, inform the choices you make about elective modules, and may very well drive where you go on the Continent (or beyond) in pursuit of this mission. PART II: ACADEMICS 14 --- PAJIRI 16 --- 2.3.2 Cheating and plagiarism Academic misconduct in the form of cheating is to be understood as, but not limited to the following: 1.​ Communicating among candidates or looking at each other’s work without due authorisation from the appointed invigilator during an assessment. Due authorization is defined as approved accommodations made according to specific assessment needs; 2.​ Introducing any paper-based/electronically stored information into the assessment venue, unless specified in the programme or module documentation; 3.​ Gaining unauthorised access to the assessments’ materials during the assessment or prior to its authorised release; 4.​ Influencing assessment content or grades given to the assessed work by threat or inducement; 5.​ Falsifying and/or fabricating laboratory, practical or observation data; 6.​ The impersonation of a candidate by another in an assessment; 7.​

given to the assessed work by threat or inducement; 5.​ Falsifying and/or fabricating laboratory, practical or observation data; 6.​ The impersonation of a candidate by another in an assessment; 7.​ Submission of a peer’s work as their own from their current cohort, or a previous cohort; 8.​ Contracting remunerated or unremunerated assessment authoring services from a peer, alumni, staff member or a person/agency external to the African Leadership University; 9.​ Submitting AI-generated assessments as if it were their own. Academic misconduct in the form of plagiarism is considered to be either the unacknowledged incorporation of the academic material (published or unpublished) of another person, the re-use of a student’s own previous written work or data presented for assessment on a previous occasion (self-plagiarism). Examples of plagiarism include, but are not limited to: 1.​ Use (including extensive copy pasting) of another person's academic material without reference or acknowledgement of the source.

The department is made up of five teams: the Learning Efficacy and Advancement Programme, the Writing Centre, Library Services, Student Professional Development. Together these teams collaborate with the academic faculty to offer students a suite of co-curricular learning enhancement programmes and services. 2.4.1 Learning Efficacy and Advancement Programme (LEAP) The LEAP Team is responsible for creating and maintaining an academically supportive environment at ALU. As its name suggests, the team primarily focuses on providing students with the general skills required to be effective learners, such as study skills, note taking, time management, presentation and communication. It also supports students who need refreshers in prerequisite academic content such as concepts in mathematics and IT. The team routinely offers workshop sessions on a range of topics throughout the year that are open to all students. Individualised coaching and mentorship is also offered through the

IT. The team routinely offers workshop sessions on a range of topics throughout the year that are open to all students. Individualised coaching and mentorship is also offered through the peer mentoring programme. All students, at any stage of their learning journey and irrespective of their academic standing are welcome and encouraged to book 1:1 coaching and mentorship sessions with the LEAP team. The LEAP team is also involved in supporting students, who for any particular reason, face academic difficulties and/or need to resit courses. after this time. PART II: ACADEMICS 21 --- PAJIRI 23 --- At University level, it is expected that all students behave as independent self-directed learners. In practice this means that they do not constrain themselves only to the course material and learning resources provided directly by their faculty. Instead they are expected to use self study time to read beyond their course notes. Each course has an associated list of reading materials that students should engage in independently. They are in fact encouraged to explore learning resources beyond the reading list of their courses. Some courses, including the final year capstone, require students to conduct independent research in particular fields.​ ​ As such, the ALU library is an essential part of the student learning environment. The role of the library is to support students with searching, accessing and assessing relevant and credible information related to their learning goals. It also

of the student learning environment. The role of the library is to support students with searching, accessing and assessing relevant and credible information related to their learning goals. It also acts as the custodian of all new knowledge created by students and academic staff at the institution. The ALU Library is primarily digital via Librarika (see Librarika User Guide) which allows you to borrow books from the library. It has subscriptions to several electronic information sources, including databases that provide access to over 263,300 journals that cover topics in education, political science, leadership, social science, engineering, history, business, computers and technology, economics, entrepreneurship, and finance, among others. The library also has unlimited access to EBSCOHost (see the EBSCOHost User Guide), an additional collection of over 50,000 ebooks through our BUKU subscription (see BUKU User Guide).. PART II: ACADEMICS 36 --- PAJIRI 38 --- The Student Representative Council works alongside respective ALU administrative stakeholders representing the interests, thoughts and concerns of the student body in accordance with their values of Honour, Integrity, Gratitude and Servitude, to cement student facing processes and systems which promote and sustain a culture of value-driven leadership at ALU. The Student Representative Council (SRC) comprises five portfolios that enhance the ALU student experience. These portfolios include Academic Affairs, ALU Alive, Clubs & Societies, Social Transformation, and the Executive Committee, which comprises the President, Vice President, Secretary General, and Treasurer. The Academic Affairs portfolio promotes academic excellence and ensures students receive the support they need to excel in their studies. The ALU Alive portfolio is dedicated to creating a vibrant campus

Academic Affairs portfolio promotes academic excellence and ensures students receive the support they need to excel in their studies. The ALU Alive portfolio is dedicated to creating a vibrant campus culture by organising events and activities that foster a sense of community and belonging. The Clubs & Societies portfolio provides a platform for students to explore their interests and hobbies outside of the classroom. Similarly, the Social Transformation portfolio is dedicated to promoting socially-conscious activities and capacity-building initiatives for the broader student community and spearheading social awareness projects on campus. Ultimately, the Executive Committee serves as the governing body of the SRC, overseeing the council's effective functioning and representing the student body on critical issues. Students can access comprehensive information about the SRC and its operations, including the roles and responsibilities of its members, by referring to the SRC Constitution. 54 --- 4.8 IMMERSIVE PROGRAMS AND TRAINING 4.8.1 Immersive Programs A huge part of the ALU experience after the onboarding semester will be learning online for most of the canvas courses. The students will be introduced to the immersive programs that will be an opportunity to engage in 4-12 week learning experiences in varying African countries and/or in Silicon Valley. 4.8.2 Learning Principles Guiding the Immersive Programs Experience ●​ Adaptive: Learners are encouraged to take ownership over their growth and develop adaptive learning strategies for continuous and independent learning. We support them with scaffolding that will give them the confidence and tools they need to be successful. ●​ Inquisitive: At ALU, We aim to promote curiosity and learning that is unbound. Our learners are encouraged to pursue their interests and prototype their ideas drawing on inquiry led principles to facilitate continuous discovery, iterative design and transformative learning. ●​ Meaningful: Our

unbound. Our learners are encouraged to pursue their interests and prototype their ideas drawing on inquiry led principles to facilitate continuous discovery, iterative design and transformative learning. ●​ Meaningful: Our learners are expected to immerse themselves in the challenges and opportunities of the real world, using a process of sense-making to weave meaning and purpose from a diversity of lived experiences. ●​ Ubiquitous: Most learning is not the result of instruction in a dedicated physical spaces. We leverage how people naturally learn and avail a range of learning environments and experiences to cater for a diverse learner body. ●​ Playful: As children, we naturally engage with and make sense of a complex world through play, but our education drives us away from those instincts. We believe in the power of strategic playfulness in liberating our learners' imaginative capabilities to manage increasing levels of complexity. Licensed with the Government of Rwanda

away from those instincts. We believe in the power of strategic playfulness in liberating our learners' imaginative capabilities to manage increasing levels of complexity. Policy on Conflict of Interest The Policy on Conflicts of Interests outlines ALU’s commitment to identifying, managing, and mitigating actual or perceived conflicts that could compromise ethical decision-making, particularly in areas involving personal interests, related party transactions, and dual loyalties. It applies to all ALU stakeholders and emphasizes legal compliance, due diligence, staff training, and transparent reporting mechanisms, while outlining disciplinary consequences and legal recourse. PART II: ACADEMICS 71 --- PAJIRI 73 --- PART VIII: APPEALS 8.1 Grade appeals A student may exercise their right to appeal if they feel that one of the following situations is applicable: 1.​ There was unfairness or impropriety on the part of one or more of the assessors; 2.​ Maladministration of the assessment process; 3.​ The relevant assessment criteria have been met but not acknowledged; 4.​ The assessment was not conducted in accordance with the institutional regulations; 5.​ Assessment procedures were not conducted fairly; 6.​ The student was unjustifiably excluded from an assessment opportunity; 7.​ Any other demonstrable bias. Wherever possible and agreeable to both the student and the facilitator, it is recommended

fairly; 6.​ The student was unjustifiably excluded from an assessment opportunity; 7.​ Any other demonstrable bias. Wherever possible and agreeable to both the student and the facilitator, it is recommended for appeals to be resolved informally. Should the student feel entitled to argue any of the grounds listed above, they are encouraged to first discuss the matter with the respective facilitator within 2 working days of receipt of the assessment decision. In this situation, it is the responsibility and discretion of the facilitator to discuss and seek to resolve the matter at hand. Should the student still disagree with the judgement of their academic performance after discussing it with the respective facilitator, the present section is available to support them in the process of submitting a formal appeal. The appeal is submitted by completing the Grade Appeal Form within one calendar week of publication of the decision against which the

in the process of submitting a formal appeal. The appeal is submitted by completing the Grade Appeal Form within one calendar week of publication of the decision against which the appeal is being made, and sending it to the Registrar's Office. The appeal form should include full details of the grounds on which the appeal is based and be accompanied by any supporting documented evidence (s). TUITION AND PAYMENT To ensure a smooth enrollment process, you must fulfil your financial obligations regarding the Programme's tuition fees and any associated charges, such as accommodation and meals. For example: a.​ If a program is three years long, and one receives a grant of $1,000, the total tuition waiver will be $3,000 ($1000 * 3), covering the three years in which you are expected to complete your studies. b.​ If you end up having to take four years instead of three, the total grant will be applicable for the first three years only. 2.​ Should you be required to have a retake of any modules, you will be required to cover the full cost, and no

applicable for the first three years only. 2.​ Should you be required to have a retake of any modules, you will be required to cover the full cost, and no grant/discount will be applicable. 3.​ Expiration - Grants awarded will only be applicable for the duration that you are considered a student at ALU. Maximum period is five and a half years. 4.​ Effect of suspension - as suspension due to disciplinary actions does not impact the overall length of studies, grants will still be applicable to the applicant upon your resumption of studies, assuming that all prior conditions mentioned above have been satisfied. 5.​ These terms and conditions are applicable to every ALU student who receives a grant or discount from ALU. follow. 4.1.3 The procedures provide for five distinct categories of withdrawal from the ALU: A.​ Withdrawal at the request of the student; B.​ Withdrawal by an Assessment Board in situations where a student has consistently demonstrated an unacceptable level of engagement. --- PAJIRI 1 --- Release of In-person module-cohorts Frequently Asked Questions Context The senior leadership of ALU has decided to provide in-person options for modules taken by students of ALU Rwanda. This decision is informed by feedback from students, faculty, and external stakeholders and the university's commitment to providing a quality learning experience for its students. In 2024, the university piloted a hybrid model (classes delivered synchronously in person and online) for some modules to test student interest in returning to campus for lectures. The response was encouraging and the pilot provided key insights about our delivery model. This transition is an evolution from the 1T (in-person) + 8T (online) structure to a more immersive, flexible, and student-centered approach, offering expanded in-person learning, and richer experiential opportunities. Details This transition from an online and hybrid delivery model to a blended learning model will begin in the May 2025 trimester. No

expanded in-person learning, and richer experiential opportunities. Details This transition from an online and hybrid delivery model to a blended learning model will begin in the May 2025 trimester. No modules will be delivered in a hybrid format. Starting in May 2025, students will be able to opt in for an online or an in-person cohort transition will begin with 15 modules: BEL (9) and BSE (6). See the detailed list below. More modules will be added to the list in subsequent trimesters. This transition will increase structured and organic opportunities for ALU Rwanda’s students to engage with and immerse in our Pan-African community while utilizing our beautiful campus. We encourage students to take advantage of the increased presence of students on campus to host student events, network, set up/grow student ventures, and continue doing the hard things. The Student Life team is excited about the transition and is available

students on campus to host student events, network, set up/grow student ventures, and continue doing the hard things. The Student Life team is excited about the transition and is available to support students who are keen to take the lead in curating these opportunities. Criteria for in-person cohorts. Modes of delivery for selected modules will be confirmed after term registration closes, depending on the number of students who sign up for the in-person cohorts. An in-person cohort must have at least 15 students enrolled to be eligible for implementation. Cohorts with fewer students will be delivered in an online format. Purpose of this Document. We recognize that students will have many questions about this evolution, so this document details responses to some of the questions we suspect you will have. If you have a question that hasn't been answered, please submit it here. [Ishusho iboneka kuri iyi pajiri: image_0] ---

to some of the questions we suspect you will have. If you have a question that hasn't been answered, please submit it here. [Ishusho iboneka kuri iyi pajiri: image_0] --- PAJIRI 2 --- Frequently Asked Questions 1.​ Why is the university providing in-person cohorts? The senior leadership of ALU has decided to provide in-person options for modules taken by students of ALU Rwanda. This decision is informed by feedback from students, faculty, and external stakeholders and the university's commitment to providing a quality learning experience for its students. 2.​ Will there still be hybrid courses? No, all modules will now be delivered either online or in person. However, if we have a session that requires both students online and in-person to attend at the same time, we will create a hybrid session. 3.​ Which modules can I take in person? For the May 2025 trimester, there are 9 modules in

to attend at the same time, we will create a hybrid session. 3.​ Which modules can I take in person? For the May 2025 trimester, there are 9 modules in the BSE with an in-person variant and 6 in BEL. The full list is in the Annex below. Additionally, students taking online sections can still sign up for and attend office hours in person with faculty on campus. 4.​ If I choose an in-person cohort, can I switch to an online cohort? What about if I choose an online cohort. Can I switch to an in-person cohort? The learning experience for in-person cohorts is designed for in-person engagement involving specific activities tailored for in-class group work and peer learning. Online classes also have specific activities tailored to an online learning environment. Therefore, switching cohorts will impact your learning experience as well as that of your cohort (Ex: Peer Work). If

classes also have specific activities tailored to an online learning environment. Therefore, switching cohorts will impact your learning experience as well as that of your cohort (Ex: Peer Work). If a student has an emergency that requires them to be absent from class for a few sessions, they can request an approved absence via the usual leave of absence request process (see section 19 of the Assessment Policy). In exceptional circumstances, such as medical or family emergencies, the request should be reported via email to the Program Lead, Associate Director of Academics, and Student Life Manager to evaluate the need for a permanent switch to an online cohort. The Associate Director of Academics will then approve the request and have the switch made officially. If you opt into an in-person cohort and do not fulfill the minimum required attendance, you will lose the associated grades for attendance and engagement. 5.​

the switch made officially. If you opt into an in-person cohort and do not fulfill the minimum required attendance, you will lose the associated grades for attendance and engagement. 5.​ Is there a limit to in-person cohort size or the number of in-person cohorts in a module? Each of the selected modules will have a maximum of 2 in-person cohorts. The BEL modules have a minimum cohort size of 15 and a maximum of 40 students, while BSE modules have a minimum cohort size of 20 and a maximum of 40 students. The Trimester-6 modules in these tracks will have only one variant (either in-person or online) depending on the registration numbers. 6.​ Will the

total enrollment is usually less than 10. The Trimester-6 modules in these tracks will have only one variant (either in-person or online) depending on the registration numbers. 6.​ Will the content be the same for in-person and online cohorts? Yes, the learning objectives, content, resources, and assessments will be the same for both variants of a module. The only difference will be the mode of delivery. We encourage students to participate fully in whichever variant they choose so they can enjoy the full experience of the module’s delivery by being physically and mentally present in class, turning on their cameras in the online variant, doing the necessary pre-work, and actively participating in the module. 7.​ Can I choose in-person for one module and online for another module in the same trimester? Yes. Since not all modules have an in-person modality, all students will still take some of their modules online.

For the May trimester, all courses running parallel to Skills Immersion modules only have a virtual variant. For subsequent trimesters and changes, you may refer the Annex section. 9.​ When will we choose our cohorts? As usual, students will select their cohorts during registration. For courses with an in-person variant, students will make their choice during the registration period as well. 10.​Can we choose cohorts based on faculty as well? No. Students can only select a cohort based on the mode of delivery and not the faculty assigned to the cohort. 11.​Will ALU eventually stop the online variants of all modules? At this

only select a cohort based on the mode of delivery and not the faculty assigned to the cohort. 11.​Will ALU eventually stop the online variants of all modules? At this point in time, the university has decided to deliver modules in a blended format which includes online and in-person variants. 12.​What will happen if the number of students who choose an in-person mode is less than the set threshold? If the number of students who sign up for the in-person variant is less than 15 the in-person variant will not be delivered for that trimester, and students would be enrolled in the online version of the module, instead. This is to ensure that the in-person experience and faculty resources are optimized. If the entire class is less than 25, then the entire class needs to select an in person variant for it to be delivered in that format. If students

If a student is doing a retake for a module that has an in-person variant, they can choose the in-person option. 14.​Will there be any changes to grading policies or assessments based on the mode of delivery? No. Attendance and engagement will be graded in the same way for both modalities. Assessment will also be the same and will be done via Canvas for both modalities. 15.​Will in-person classes be recorded for students who miss a session? No, in-person classes will not be recorded.

be the same and will be done via Canvas for both modalities. 15.​Will in-person classes be recorded for students who miss a session? No, in-person classes will not be recorded. 16.​Will extracurricular activities be expanded to accommodate the increased number of students on campus? Yes, the Student Life team in collaboration with student leaders will create new extra-curricular activities for students. We will like to see many more student-led activities on campus and invite students to propose events they wish to collaborate with Student Life on or host them directly. 17.​Will in-person students have priority access to internship or networking opportunities? No, all students will have the same opportunities regardless of their choice of mode of delivery. Note that each internship opportunity offered by ALU or external partners has its own criteria independent of how many modules a student has opted to take in person, and students will be selected

internship opportunity offered by ALU or external partners has its own criteria independent of how many modules a student has opted to take in person, and students will be selected for those opportunities based on those criteria. In-person networking opportunities, as well as masterclasses on campus organized by the Global Leadership Experiences team, will be announced to the entire student body or to students with interests relevant to or linked to the opportunity. This process will not be changed. The team will also provide options for hybrid or online-only experiences to ensure participation for students outside of Rwanda. 18.​Will ALU provide any financial support to students opting for in-person learning? No. The university will not provide financial support to students who opt for in-person variants of selected modules. We recognize that switching to in-person delivery may have financial implications for some students, which is why we are committed to maintaining

who opt for in-person variants of selected modules. Yes, students will need to select their preferred delivery format for modules every trimester during registration period for that trimester.
